summary: Iteration 40 - Phase 3 Operational Control System: Approval Workflow Engine testing complete. Backend: 27/27 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI elements and interactions working correctly. All 5 approval types (Purchase, Discount, Void, Price Override, Credit Override) with multi-level threshold-based approval working correctly.

APPROVAL_TYPES_API.test_approval_types_content: PASS - Each type has code, name, description, levels, approvers

APPROVAL_REQUEST_CREATE.test_create_approval_request_auto_approv: PASS - Small amount returns auto_approved status
APPROVAL_REQUEST_CREATE.test_create_approval_request_pending: PASS - Large amount creates pending approval with ID
APPROVAL_REQUEST_CREATE.test_create_void_approval_request: PASS - Void transaction creates pending approval

PENDING_APPROVALS_API.test_get_pending_approvals: PASS - Returns pending list with items/total

APPROVAL_ACTION_API.test_approve_request: PASS - Approve changes status to approved
APPROVAL_ACTION_API.test_reject_request: PASS - Reject changes status to rejected

ROLE_BASED_ACCESS.test_kasir_cannot_approve: PASS - Kasir gets 403 when trying to approve
ROLE_BASED_ACCESS.test_owner_can_approve_all: PASS - Owner can approve level 3 requests

DASHBOARD_SUMMARY_API.test_get_dashboard_summary: PASS - Returns pending_by_type, today_stats, my_pending_requests, pending_for_my_approval, total_pending

AUDIT_TRAIL.test_approval_action_creates_audit: PASS - Approval creates audit log with approver info and timestamp

FRONTEND_UI_TESTS.page_load: PASS - Approval Center page loads at /approval-center
FRONTEND_UI_TESTS.dashboard_cards: PASS - 4 summary cards (Total Pending, Menunggu Approval Saya, Disetujui Hari Ini, Ditolak Hari Ini)
FRONTEND_UI_TESTS.tabs: PASS - All 3 tabs working (Pending Approvals, My Requests, Approval Rules)
FRONTEND_UI_TESTS.approval_rules_display: PASS - All 5 approval types displayed with levels
FRONTEND_UI_TESTS.pending_items_display: PASS - Pending items show with type badge, status badge, requester info
FRONTEND_UI_TESTS.detail_modal: PASS - Modal shows full details, notes input, approve/reject buttons
FRONTEND_UI_TESTS.search_filter: PASS - Search and type filter working

verified_features.audit_trail: All approval/reject actions logged to audit_logs collection

critical_code_review_comments: All endpoints properly protected with get_current_user authentication
Role-based access control correctly implemented - kasir cannot approve
Audit trail properly logs all approval actions
Frontend UI correctly displays all approval types with their levels

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All UI elements and interactions working

seed_data_created: Test approval requests created with TEST_ prefix for testing - 10+ approvals created during test run
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 Approval Workflow Engine fully tested and working. 5 approval types with multi-level threshold-based approvals. Owner/Admin can approve all levels, Kasir cannot approve (gets 403). All API endpoints working correctly. Frontend Approval Center page has 3 tabs - Pending Approvals, My Requests, Approval Rules. Dashboard shows summary stats. Detail modal allows approve/reject with notes. Audit trail records all actions.
